allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sharp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sql'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('window'\)\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('c'\) && k.length < 8\).slice\(0,20\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {SiSharp, SiDotnet} = require\('react-icons/si'\); console.log\('SiSharp displayName:', SiSharp.displayName || SiSharp.name\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content 'lib/i18n.tsx'\) -replace 'Digitec Galaxus AG', 'Galaxus AG' -replace 'Digitec Galaxus', 'Galaxus' -replace '· Digitec', '· Galaxus' -replace 'bei Digitec ', 'bei Galaxus ' -replace 'at Digitec ', 'at Galaxus ' -replace \\"Digitec'te\\", \\"Galaxus'ta\\" | Set-Content 'lib/i18n.tsx'")
